THE
HELM

WHERE YOUR VOICE STEERS THE SHIP AND WHERE PARADISE GOES

East End Faithful
Who We Are

In The Heart
Of The East End

"We don't just ride the wave — we steer the ship."

The Helm is the official supporters' section of Sarasota Paradise FC — the voice of the East End from first whistle to last.

We are the drums, the flares, the scarves held high. In Paradise, every match is a voyage and we're all crew.

Based in Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, and Bradenton. Founded on salt air, teal blood, and an unshakeable love for the beautiful game.

2025
Founded
USL1
League
Board the Ship Hail the Captain
2025 Season

Learn the Songs

The Songbook
of Paradise

Know the words before you arrive. The East End is only as loud as every voice in it — these are the anthems of The Helm. Sing them proud, sing them loud.

Origin: Neil Diamond's Sweet Caroline
When: Goal, end of match

Sweet Paradise…(bum, bum, bum)
Good times never felt so good, so good! so good! so good!
Sweet Paradise…(bum, bum, bum)
Scoring never felt so good
so good! so good! so good!
Winning variation for the last line below:
Winning never felt so good
so good! so good! so good!
Origin: Battle Hymn of the Republic

Glory, glory Sarasota!
Glory, glory Sarasota!
Glory, glory Sarasota!
From the Helm we sing you on

(repeat 2–4 times)
Come on Sota score a goal
It's very very simple
Put the ball into the net
and we'll go really mental!
Na na na na na naaa
na na na na naaaa
na na na na na na
(repeat 2–4 times)
Origin: MLS chants, notably "Oh Columbus" from the Columbus Crew

Oh, o-oh, o-oh, o-oh, o-oho-o-oh,
o-o-oh, o-o-o-ohParadise!
(repeat 2–4 times)
PAR – A – DISE
With drums, think "let's go Bucs"

S-R-Q
Followed by drum taps
Dolley Dolley Dolley Dolley hohhh
Dolley Dolley Dolley Dolley hohhh
Dolllleeeeeeey Dolllleeeeey
hohhhhhhhh!
SARASOTA!

(repeat 2–4 times)
We love ya
we love ya
we love ya

And where you go
we'll follow
we'll follow
we'll follow

Cause we support
you Sota
you Sota
you Sota

And that's the way
we like it
we like it
we like it

woah (x4)
Sarasota…Sarasota….
Hey hey hey
paradise!
(repeat 3-4 times)
We Love you Paradise, we do
We love you Paradise, we do
We love you Paradise, we do
Oooooh, Paradise we love you!
(repeat 1 time)
Origin: When Johnny Comes Marching Home

We come from the land of sand and sun
PARADISE!
PARADISE!
And for our club our hearts forever true, Stay True!
One heart, one voice
This songs for you!
We sing in across the SRQ!
Beneath these skies, our dreams rings true,
PARADISE!
Origin: Wild Rover by Dublineers

And it's Declan Waters!
Our captain, our wall!
He keeps strikers at bay
We cheer him evermore
When: after the match, serenade the players.

Dont worry about a thing
'Cause every little thing
Gonna be alright
(In Paradise)

Singing, don't worry about a thing
'Cause every little thing
Gonna be alright
(In Paradise)

Sun on the horizon, Orange and blues in the sky
Our boys are on the pitch, we're right by their side
Singing sweet songs, lifting their spirits high
Singing, this is our message to you

Singing don't worry about a thing
Every little thing is gonna be alright
Singing, don't worry about a thing
We're the Paradise and we will fight, fight, fight!
Capo: Who are we?
Section: PARADISE!
Ole Ole Ole Ole Ola
Saraaaa…soooota
(repeat 3-4 times)
